TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Dave Batton sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1956, byacing te 3 ru 26 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Maryland, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 208 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 109 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1978 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu New Jersey Nets. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *a*e ő≤atton s~…ēraral ńßja Ē…£a s~…ēis~…ējuw na nő≤a, wal malaxmis~…ēuq qanij la. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a marjlan*, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, *** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu new *ers~…ēej nets~…ē. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Dave Batton sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1956, byacing te 3 ru 26 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Maryland, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 208 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 109 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1978 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu New Jersey Nets. pincyuwagan nya' cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
